title: Backend Developer
descriptions: Design, development, and maintenance of web systems using Laravel as the main framework.
Implementation of best programming practices and code quality assurance.
Management of SQL databases, ensuring efficient data storage and retrieval.

title: Backend Developer
descriptions: Development and maintenance of backend applications using Laravel, applying SOLID principles and clean architecture.
Implementation of REST APIs and internal services to support communication between system modules.
Optimization of PostgreSQL queries to improve performance in high-volume data operations.
Automation of critical processes using queues and cron jobs, increasing operational efficiency.
Monitoring and management of logs to ensure system stability and quick issue resolution.

title: Backend Developer
descriptions: Refactoring of complex services following SOLID principles, improving code quality and reducing technical debt.
